table.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 2px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the item can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Fragebogen zur strukturierten Dokumentation der Bildgebung Mamma (Mammographie, Sonographie, MRT, Tomosynthese). Nutzt SDC Definition-based Extraction mit DiagnosticReport und Observation als Ziele.

ul.li: http://snomed.info/sct#397138000 ("Mammography assessment (Category 0) - Need additional imaging evaluation")
http://snomed.info/sct#397143007 ("Mammography assessment (Category 3) - Probably benign finding, short interval follow-up")
http://snomed.info/sct#397144001 ("Mammography assessment (Category 4) - Suspicious abnormality, biopsy should be considered")
http://snomed.info/sct#397145000 ("Mammography assessment (Category 5) - Highly suggestive of malignancy")
http://snomed.info/sct#6111000179101 ("Mammography assessment (Category 6) - known biopsy, proven malignancy")

publisher.value: Berlin Institute of Health at Charité (BIH)

name.value: Berlin Institute of Health at Charité (BIH)

description.value: Fragebogen zur strukturierten Dokumentation der Bildgebung Mamma (Mammographie, Sonographie, MRT, Tomosynthese). Nutzt SDC Definition-based Extraction mit DiagnosticReport und Observation als Ziele.

display.value: Mammography assessment (Category 0) - Need additional imaging evaluation
Mammography assessment (Category 3) - Probably benign finding, short interval follow-up
Mammography assessment (Category 4) - Suspicious abnormality, biopsy should be considered
Mammography assessment (Category 5) - Highly suggestive of malignancy
Mammography assessment (Category 6) - known biopsy, proven malignancy
